description_long: This bungalow complex features multiple single-story structures with pitched, shingled roofs and wooden exteriors, arranged on a rectangular grassy plot. The main building is centrally located and flanked by two smaller outbuildings, with a covered porch and steps leading up to the entrance. A rectangular swimming pool is situated adjacent to the main house, partially enclosed by the buildings. The roofs are gabled, and the buildings are connected by open green space, with each structure having its own distinct roofline and entryway. The overall layout is open and spacious, with clear separation between the main living area and auxiliary buildings. The design emphasizes natural materials and a harmonious integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A multi-structure bungalow complex with gabled shingle roofs, wooden exteriors, and a central swimming pool, set on a grassy rectangular plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main bungalow with a porch, flanked by two outbuildings and a visible swimming pool behind the central structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the linear arrangement of the buildings, the pool adjacent to the main house, and the open grassy area in front.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the main bungalow, the steps leading up to the porch, and the alignment of the outbuildings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the spatial relationship between all buildings, the pool, and the open green space.
